payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.subtitle: Verkli uses Stripe Connect Express. KYC once; Stripe handles payouts and tax forms.
payouts.setupBody: We use Stripe Connect Express. You complete KYC with Stripe (a few minutes), then we can pay out to your bank account monthly.
payouts.platformFee: Platform fee: 30% (same as Apple, Spotify, Patreon)
payouts.schedule: Default schedule: monthly · PRO/PRO+ can choose weekly
payouts.taxForms: Stripe handles tax forms (1099 / control statements)
payouts.balanceComingSoon: Ledger data wires up in Week 3 alongside PRO tier SKUs. Stripe Dashboard has the full ledger today — open it from your Stripe account.
payouts.kyc_submitted: KYC submitted. Stripe is reviewing — usually clears within a few minutes.
payouts.kyc_incomplete: Onboarding started but not completed. Click "Continue onboarding" to finish.
payouts.needs_onboarding: Set up payouts before you can sell books.
payouts.onboarding_failed: Something went wrong with onboarding. Try again.
